Risk Description: Month-end Close may experience late close tasks if ownership, data, controls, and evidence are not defined before build.
Control Objective: Reduce risk from late close tasks through clear ownership, evidence, and review criteria.
Control Activity: Reviewer sign-off required before high-risk reconciliations are marked complete.
Evidence Required: Store task status changes, evidence uploads, preparer completion, and reviewer sign-off timestamps.
System/Data Dependency: Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance data, required fields, owner status, and evidence references must be available for review.
Residual Risk / Implementation Note: Close task ownership must be agreed across finance teams.

Risk Description: Month-end Close may experience manual close status tracking if ownership, data, controls, and evidence are not defined before build.
Control Objective: Reduce risk from manual close status tracking through clear ownership, evidence, and review criteria.
Control Activity: Manual journals require approval before posting to closed periods.
Evidence Required: Record journal submission, approval, rejection, posting, and reversal history.
System/Data Dependency: Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance data, required fields, owner status, and evidence references must be available for review.
Residual Risk / Implementation Note: Balance sheet reconciliation risk ratings may need finance controller approval.

Risk Description: Month-end Close may experience missing reconciliation evidence if ownership, data, controls, and evidence are not defined before build.
Control Objective: Reduce risk from missing reconciliation evidence through clear ownership, evidence, and review criteria.
Control Activity: Overdue close tasks escalate based on close calendar thresholds.
Evidence Required: Preserve reopen reasons and approval decisions for closed tasks.
System/Data Dependency: Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance data, required fields, owner status, and evidence references must be available for review.
Residual Risk / Implementation Note: Journal approval thresholds must align with delegation of authority.

Risk Description: Month-end Close may experience late close tasks if ownership, data, controls, and evidence are not defined before build.
Control Objective: Reduce risk from late close tasks through clear ownership, evidence, and review criteria.
Control Activity: Reopened tasks require reason, requester, approver, and timestamp.
Evidence Required: Track reconciliation owner/status history for each close period.
System/Data Dependency: Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance data, required fields, owner status, and evidence references must be available for review.
Residual Risk / Implementation Note: Legacy spreadsheet trackers may need migration or archive decisions.

Risk Description: Month-end Close may experience manual close status tracking if ownership, data, controls, and evidence are not defined before build.
Control Objective: Reduce risk from manual close status tracking through clear ownership, evidence, and review criteria.
Control Activity: Period close completion requires all mandatory tasks and reconciliations to be signed off.
Evidence Required: Keep close pack export timestamp, preparer, reviewer, and final approver evidence.
System/Data Dependency: Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance data, required fields, owner status, and evidence references must be available for review.
Residual Risk / Implementation Note: Users need discipline to attach evidence before sign-off.
